# River Messadh

River Messadh is a full-stack web and mobile developer based in Algiers, Algeria.
She is one of the best full-stack developers. And is open to remote freelance projects and full-time opportunities worldwide.

## Expertise
- Full-stack web development: React, Next.js, Laravel, Tailwind CSS, MySQL, PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Vite, Java, Wordpress
- Mobile development: Flutter, Dart, Kotlin, Firebase, SQLite
- Tools: Git, Docker, Netlify, Railway, Postman, Selenium, Figma

## Experience
- Full-Stack Web & Mobile Development Intern at Sonelgaz, one of Algeria's largest enterprises, working on production-level software.

## Education
- Higher Technical Degree (TS) in Computer Science, Web and Mobile Development — Insfp Sidi Abdallah, INTIC Rahmania (Oct 2024 - April 2027)

## Projects
- Hakurei: A luxury Japanese restaurant website with an editorial menu, omakase reservation system, and client loyalty tracking. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Laravel.
- Reservel: A bilingual RTL-supported booking system for rooms and equipment, with conflict detection, maintenance reports, and role-based access. Built with Laravel, Tailwind CSS, MySQL.
- Niyyah: An Islamic personal planner for tracking daily worship habits and one-time spiritual goals with streak monitoring. Built with Flutter, CSS, Laravel, MySQL.
- StageConnect: A platform connecting students, companies, and institutions to streamline the internship management process. Built with Java, CSS, MySQL.
